name: Chocolate Zucchini Bread
servings: serves 16 | prep. time 15 minutes | cooking time 40-50 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a loaf tin with parchment paper.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and ground cinnamon.
Stir in the eggs, milk, vegetable oil, maple syrup, and vanilla extract.
Add the shredded zucchini and chocolate chips. Mix until just combined.
Transfer the batter to the prepared loaf pan. Bake for 40-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center of the cake comes out clean.
